{"cards": [{"name": "Forge of Possibilities", "mana_cost": "{2}{R}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Choose two —
• ~ deals 4 damage to any target.
• Destroy target artifact.
• Create two 1/1 red Goblin creature tokens with haste.
• Until end of turn, whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, copy it.", "flavor_text": "Where chaos meets opportunity, power is born.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "A rare modal instant that showcases red's versatility. Four modes covering damage, artifact destruction, token generation, and spell-slinging. 'Choose two' creates complex decision trees while keeping the text manageable. Each mode is costed appropriately for the total mana cost. Tests modal formatting with multiple bullet points."}, {"name": "Chronicle of the Verdant Realm", "mana_cost": "{2}{G}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment — Saga", "oracle_text": "I — Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
II — Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.
III — You gain life equal to the number of lands you control, then draw a card.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "A green saga that tells the story of natural growth and prosperity. Chapter I ramps (classic green), Chapter II strengthens creatures (+1/+1 counters), Chapter III provides life gain and card draw as a payoff. Each chapter flows thematically from growth to strength to abundance. Tests proper Saga formatting with Roman numerals and em dashes."}, {"name": "Crystal Caverns", "mana_cost": "", "cmc": 0, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Land", "oracle_text": "~ enters tapped.
{T}: Add {C}.
{3}, {T}: Scry 2.", "flavor_text": "The deeper you delve, the clearer the future becomes.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "A colorless nonbasic land with an activated ability. Enters tapped as drawback for the utility. Scry 2 for {3} and tap is reasonably costed for an uncommon utility land. Tests land templating with enters-tapped drawback, mana production, and activated ability. The scry ability provides card selection without being overpowered."}, {"name": "Forest", "mana_cost": "", "cmc": 0, "colors": [], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Basic Land — Forest", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {G}.", "flavor_text": "Ancient roots drink deep from streams of pure mana, nourishing all life in their embrace.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "A basic Forest with evocative flavor text. Basic lands have color identity matching their mana production despite having no colored mana symbols in their mana cost. The flavor text captures the mystical, life-giving essence of forests in Magic's multiverse. Tests basic land generation with proper formatting."}]}
